title: Responses Runner V2 Supervisor Archive

schema_version.description: Schema version identifier for this artifact contract.

archive_id.description: Stable identifier for a supervisor archive record.

archived_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when this attempt was archived.

run_dir.description: Repository-relative path to the local run directory.

run_id.description: Stable identifier for one workflow run.

workflow_id.description: Stable identifier for the workflow that owns this artifact.

stage_id.description: Stable identifier for the workflow stage.

source.description: Source run and stage metadata for an archived attempt.

source_path.description: Describes the `source_path` field for this artifact contract.

archive_path.description: Describes the `archive_path` field for this artifact contract.

sha256.description: Describes the `sha256` field for this artifact contract.

bytes.description: Describes the `bytes` field for this artifact contract.

request_hash.description: Digest binding the request evidence used for this attempt.

scaffold_hash.description: Digest binding the staged scaffold used for this attempt.

request_evidence.description: Evidence describing the request payload and run context.

scaffold_evidence.description: Evidence describing the staged scaffold used for the attempt.

request_hash_before.description: Describes the `request_hash_before` field for this artifact contract.

scaffold_hash_before.description: Describes the `scaffold_hash_before` field for this artifact contract.

rerun_requires_same_hashes.description: Describes the `rerun_requires_same_hashes` field for this artifact contract.

unchanged_input_evidence.description: Evidence that rerun inputs match the archived attempt.

retry_budget_before.description: Retry budget before applying this archive or recovery action.

retry_budget_after.description: Retry budget after applying this archive or recovery action.

rerun_as_is_eligible.description: Whether the archived attempt may be rerun without changing inputs.

description: Responses Runner V2 Supervisor Archive JSON schema.
